title: schedonorus altissimus
intro: Schedonorus altissimus, also known as giant wood grass or giant oat grass, is a species of grass native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Schedonorus altissimus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Schedonorus altissimus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also sometimes used in folk medicine to make poultices and ointments for topical application.
